---
title: "Case Studies"
description: "Cold War, OPEC, climate, market design, sports, poker — theory meets historical reality."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="case-studies"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Case Studies</h1>
  <p class="lead">Cold War, OPEC, climate, market design, sports, poker — theory meets historical reality.</p>
</div>
```
